name: TravelDiary
description: TravelDiary is a travel journaling app that allows users to document and reflect on their travel experiences. It provides a user-friendly interface for recording memories, photos, and itineraries.
features: Trip planning and organization with customizable itineraries
Photo and memory journaling with location tagging and mapping
Optional export and sharing features for travel blogs or social media
target_audience: Travelers, adventure seekers, and individuals looking to document their travel experiences
